name: Magento Open Source
description: Magento 2 (Open Source / Community Edition) development environment with PHP-FPM, MariaDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, OpenSearch, MailHog, and an optional Nginx sidecar. Auto-installs Magento on first start.

phpVersion.description: PHP version. Must align with the Magento version you intend to install.

composerVersion.description: Composer version to install. Use 'latest-stable' for the most recent 2.x.

commerceEdition.description: Composer project to bootstrap when no composer.json is present in the workspace.
